project.name: gpgpu-kb
project.summary: Self-updating GPGPU chip-architecture research knowledge base. Daily ingest of ArXiv / curated RSS (12) / sitemap-driven blog scraper / GitHub trending; per-source-type LLM scoring on universal axes (quality, relevance); ChromaDB-backed semantic search and multi-turn / source-anchored RAG chat with on-demand arxiv PDF full-text loading and SSE streaming token output via Fast/Expert dual-role LLM (call_llm/stream_llm with role parameter); manual web-trigger of the daily pipeline with SSE-streamed progress (POST /api/daily/stream); bilingual (en/zh) Markdown daily reports; per-source-name ingest cold-start; Dockerized deployment with optional cron pipeline; themed i18n frontend shell (Cream Linen / Walnut Hearth oklch dual-theme + en/zh i18n via LocaleProvider/ThemeProvider with FOUC-prevention inline script).
stack: Threading + bounded Queue (in-process daily pipeline runner)

api_routes: GET /api/papers (sort_by adds quality_score|relevance_score|total_score; default total_score; include_low_quality flag)
GET /api/papers/search (semantic with keyword fallback; LIKE wildcards escaped)
POST /api/chat (Bearer guard via verify_chat_token; supports paper_id (source-anchored) + history[]; uses expert role LLM; shares _build_chat_context with /api/chat/stream)
POST /api/chat/stream (Bearer guard; SSE text/event-stream; events: sources -> token... -> done [+ optional error]; uses expert role LLM)
GET /api/daily/status (NEW 2026-05-03 22:34:43; Bearer guard; returns _DailyRunState snapshot {running, started_at, current_stage} for cross-tab in-flight detection)

POST /api/daily/stream (NEW 2026-05-03 22:34:43; Bearer guard; SSE text/event-stream; events: started -> stage(<=4) -> log(N) -> done|error; 15s idle keepalive ': keepalive' SSE comment frame; HTTP 409 if another run is in-flight; runs run_daily_pipeline() in a daemon thread without subprocess via _DailyRunState singleton + threading.Lock + bounded Queue(maxsize=2000); _STAGE_PATTERN=r'\[([1-4])/4\]' matches both English and Chinese banners)
GET /api/stats (adds top_overall: cross-source-type top-5 by max(quality, relevance))
data_models: Paper (papers): includes universal score axes quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale alongside legacy originality_score / impact_score / impact_rationale; full_text TEXT column lazily populated by source-anchored chat (PDF extraction)
modules.config: backend/kb/config.py (Pydantic Settings, KB_* env, .env). Fields: language, ingest_empty_db_days, ingest_gap_min_days, ingest_gap_max_days, deepseek_*, chat_token, quality_score_threshold, data_dir, llm_timeout_seconds, llm_provider, llm_expert_provider, llm_expert_model, anthropic_model, openai_model, deepseek_model, etc.
modules.dependencies: backend/pyproject.toml (extras: ml, llm-cloud, dev). Default deps include pypdf>=5.0. Docker controls extras via ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=ml,llm-cloud (default).
modules.tests: backend/tests/ (~210 tests; this run added 6 daily-pipeline SSE cases via _drain_daily_sse helper + _patch_daily + _reset_daily_state in test_api_smoke.py: idle status / happy 4-stage flow / 409 concurrency / exception -> error frame / Bearer token guard on both /api/daily/status and /api/daily/stream / Chinese stage banner '[N/4] 数据采集' detected by _STAGE_PATTERN)
llm_providers: hermes (local CLI; not available in Docker; cannot truly stream)

llm_role_overlay.public_api: call_llm(prompt, role='fast'|'expert') -> str; stream_llm(prompt, role='fast'|'expert') -> Iterator[str]; both default to role='fast' for back-compat with non-role callers.
llm_role_overlay._resolve_role: _resolve_role(role) -> (provider_name, model_override): role='expert' -> (settings.llm_expert_provider or settings.llm_provider, settings.llm_expert_model); else -> (settings.llm_provider, None).
llm_role_overlay.provider_signature: All _call_* / _stream_* providers accept (prompt, *, model: str | None = None). model=None falls back to settings.<provider>_model; non-None overrides. Hermes accepts but ignores model (CLI has no --model flag).
llm_role_overlay.transparency: If KB_LLM_EXPERT_PROVIDER and KB_LLM_EXPERT_MODEL are both unset, expert role transparently delegates to fast role — zero behavioral change vs pre-2026-05-03 21:41:00 deployments.

daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.purpose: Replicate `python -m kb.daily` execution via HTTP without spawning a subprocess; let frontend /reports page Run-Now button fire it and stream live progress.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.auth: Both endpoints use dependencies=[Depends(verify_chat_token)] — Bearer-token-guarded same as /api/chat[/stream] when KB_CHAT_TOKEN is set.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.concurrency_model: _DailyRunState singleton holds threading.Lock + _running flag + Queue(maxsize=2000). try_start() atomically claims the slot; second concurrent POST gets HTTPException(409, 'A daily pipeline run is already in progress.'). end() in worker finally releases the lock.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.execution_model: _run_daily_in_worker(queue) runs in a daemon thread. Inside the function body it does `from kb.daily import run_daily_pipeline` (lazy import) so test monkeypatch.setattr(daily_mod, 'run_daily_pipeline', ...) is hit when the worker starts. NO SUBPROCESS — daemon thread directly occupies the main backend process's compute.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.log_capture: _QueueLogHandler is added to root logger so logging.* lines are pumped into the queue. _QueueStdoutWriter via contextlib.redirect_stdout captures the pipeline's banner print() lines (kb/daily.py prints '[N/4] <stage>' headers, not log calls). Both routes feed the same queue; the SSE generator does not distinguish source.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.termination_invariant: finally block ALWAYS does queue.put_nowait(('__terminator__', None)). The SSE generator breaks on this sentinel; without it the generator hangs forever on queue.get(timeout=15).
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.stage_detection: _STAGE_PATTERN = re.compile(r'\[([1-4])/4\]'); _STAGE_NAMES = {1:'ingestion',2:'processing',3:'embedding',4:'report'}. kb/daily.py prints the [N/4] prefix regardless of KB_LANGUAGE (only the stage NAME after the prefix is translated), so both 'INGESTION' and '数据采集' banners work; this is hard contract between kb/daily.py banners and main.py _STAGE_PATTERN.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.stage_dedup: last_stage_emitted tracks the last index emitted; banner reprints don't double-fire stage frames.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.event_sequence: started (exactly 1; payload {started_at}) -> stage (<=4; payload {index, name}) -> log (N; payload {line}) -> done (exactly 1 OR error if exception; mutually exclusive). 15s idle in queue.get -> yield ': keepalive\n\n' SSE comment frame; frontend _parseDailyFrame must skip lines starting with ':'.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.headers: X-Accel-Buffering: no + Cache-Control: no-cache (defeats nginx/cpolar buffering for text/event-stream).
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.no_reattach_design: There is intentionally no 'reattach to running stream' mechanism — SSE stream ownership belongs to the originating POST connection. Other tabs / clients trying to POST again get 409; they should poll /api/daily/status for {running, current_stage} to render 'in-flight' UI but cannot consume the live stream.
daily_pipeline_web_trigger_2026_05_03_22.behavior_when_browser_closes: Daemon thread is unaffected by client disconnect; pipeline runs to completion -> writes DB -> releases _DailyRunState lock. Next /reports page load hits /api/daily/status which shows idle, with new data already in the DB. Only backend process exit interrupts the pipeline.

auth.chat_endpoint: Optional Bearer token via KB_CHAT_TOKEN; compared via hmac.compare_digest in verify_chat_token (Depends).
auth.daily_endpoints_same_guard_2026_05_03_22: /api/daily/status AND /api/daily/stream both use dependencies=[Depends(verify_chat_token)]; reuse the same Bearer token guard. Any new 'expensive / writing / job-triggering' endpoint MUST reuse this dependency — convention going forward.

scoring.quality_gate: max(quality, relevance) >= KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0). Applied ONLY to source_type=paper.
scoring.paper_legacy_mirror: For papers, summarize_and_score copies quality->originality_score, relevance->impact_score, score_rationale->impact_rationale.

ingestion.per_source_cold_start: _lookback_for_source(source_name) per fetcher: empty source_name -> KB_INGEST_EMPTY_DB_DAYS (default 30); existing -> now - max(ingested_date) clamped to [KB_INGEST_GAP_MIN_DAYS, KB_INGEST_GAP_MAX_DAYS]. 4 fetchers (arxiv / rss / sitemap_blog / github) all support days_back: int | None signature.

modules.cold_start_handling: kb.daily detects whether any paper has is_processed != 0 (processing) and whether any is_processed=1 row has chroma_id != '' (embedding). If neither, run_processing / index_unindexed_papers run with batch_size=None to drain the entire backlog. Steady-state runs cap at 100/run.

chinese_mode.scope: summarize prompt suffix, score_rationale value (JSON keys stay English), daily report content + title + section names. CLI override: python -m kb.daily --lang zh.
chinese_mode.chat_prompt_now_hardcoded_chinese: AS OF 2026-05-02 21:18:53: /api/chat and /api/chat/stream system prompts are HARDCODED to Chinese in _build_chat_context — KB_LANGUAGE no longer affects them.
chinese_mode.frontend_locale_independent: Frontend UI language (en/zh) is controlled separately via gpgpu-kb.locale.v1 in browser localStorage — independent of backend KB_LANGUAGE. Chat outputs are always Chinese; Browse / Reports / Stats UI strings follow the user's localStorage choice.

docker.dockerfile: backend/Dockerfile (python:3.12-slim, ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=ml,llm-cloud, VOLUME /app/data, HEALTHCHECK /api/health, CMD uvicorn ... --timeout-keep-alive 75)
docker.daily_profile: docker compose --profile cron run --rm daily (one-shot pipeline reusing backend image; isolated container vs the in-process /api/daily/stream daemon thread)

modules.api_client: frontend/src/lib/api.ts (API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ?? ''). chat() forwards optional paper_id and history. chatStream(request, {signal?}) async generator for /api/chat/stream. NEW 2026-05-03 22:34:43: getDailyStatus() (GET /api/daily/status) + runDailyStream({signal?}) async generator (POST /api/daily/stream, body '{}', Accept: text/event-stream) + DailyConflictError class (HTTP 409) + _parseDailyFrame (CRITICAL: skips lines starting with ':' to drop SSE keepalive comment frames; without this JSON.parse would throw on every keepalive). _chatPayload(request) shared by chat() and chatStream(). _parseSSEFrame joins consecutive 'data:' lines with '\n' per SSE spec.
modules.types: frontend/src/lib/types.ts (mirrors backend kb/schemas.py + kb/main.py::_sse_event). Adds quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale, Stats.top_overall?, ChatMessage{role:user|assistant,content}, ChatRequest.paper_id? / history?, ChatStreamEvent discriminated union. NEW 2026-05-03 22:34:43: DailyStatus{running, started_at, current_stage} / DailyStageName='ingestion'|'processing'|'embedding'|'report' / DailyStreamEvent discriminated union (started|stage|log|error|done; stage payload {index:1|2|3|4, name:DailyStageName}).

chat_module_2026_05_02.page_file: src/app/chat/page.tsx (Suspense + ChatContent; DisplayMessage extends ChatMessage with renderer-only sources?/error?/streaming?; _stripDisplay strips WELCOME and error/streaming before persistence + before sending to backend)
chat_module_2026_05_02.history_persistence: src/hooks/use-conversation-history.ts: localStorage key 'gpgpu-kb.chat.conversations.v1', cap 50 conversations, sorted by updatedAt desc, SSR-safe (returns [] before mount), hydrated flag.
chat_module_2026_05_02.streaming: chatStream() async generator + abortRef + Stop button (red Square) + finalize 3-state (showError|aborted|done).

i18n_module.default_locale: en (must match SSR markup html lang='en')
i18n_module.key_count: ~110 keys covering: brand / shell / nav / lang / theme / search / browse / card / score / paper / reports.run.* / stats / chat / picker
i18n_module.translation_key_type: TranslationKey = keyof typeof translations.en — TS auto-validates t() calls; en is source of truth, missing zh keys silently render the raw key string (no lint check, manual review required)
i18n_module.interpolation: _interpolate(template, params) supports {name} placeholders; NO ICU plurals — split into multiple keys if needed
i18n_module.ssr_strategy: Always render DEFAULT_LOCALE during SSR / first paint; useEffect on mount reads localStorage and reconciles. Sets document.documentElement.lang = 'zh-CN' | 'en' so a11y / browser translation / :lang() selector follow
i18n_module.format_helpers: formatDate / formatLongDate / localeTag wrap Date.toLocaleDateString with locale-aware tags (en-US / zh-CN)

theme_module.default_theme: dark (must match SSR markup html className='dark')
theme_module.fouc_prevention: app/layout.tsx <head> contains an inline <script dangerouslySetInnerHTML> that synchronously reads localStorage.getItem('gpgpu-kb.theme.v1') and toggles <html class='dark'> BEFORE React mounts. Painted body never flickers. THIS INLINE SCRIPT HARDCODES THE STORAGE KEY LITERAL — change THEME_STORAGE_KEY in provider.tsx requires also editing layout.tsx::THEME_INIT_SCRIPT (no IDE check)
theme_module.html_attrs: <html lang='en' className='h-full antialiased dark' suppressHydrationWarning> — suppressHydrationWarning silences React class/lang mismatch warnings caused by FOUC script + LocaleProvider mount-effect reconciliation
theme_module.viewport_themecolor: viewport.themeColor dual-mode follows OS prefers-color-scheme to tint the address bar; INDEPENDENT of <html class> runtime toggle (OS-level vs UI-level signals)

css_overhaul.approach: @theme inline + oklch CSS variables; replaces all bg-zinc-950 hardcodes with semantic shadcn tokens

themes_palette.cream_linen_root: Light: parchment cream background (oklch 0.975 0.012 80) + caramel amber primary (oklch 0.65 0.115 60) + chestnut foreground (oklch 0.27 0.025 55). Long-form-reading friendly.
themes_palette.walnut_hearth_dark: Dark: walnut bark background (oklch 0.18 0.015 50) instead of pure black + roasted cocoa surfaces + toasted amber primary (oklch 0.78 0.1 70) + oat-mist foreground (oklch 0.92 0.018 80). Cozy fireside dark.

css_overhaul.dark_variant: @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *)) explicitly declares dark variant for Tailwind v4
css_overhaul.coding_convention_change: From this point on, NEW components MUST NOT use bg-zinc-* / text-zinc-* hardcodes; use semantic tokens (bg-background / text-foreground / bg-card / bg-sidebar / text-muted-foreground / bg-primary text-primary-foreground / etc.). Exceptions: red-600 for Stop button (red is universally 'danger'), emerald-500 for done state.

shell_components.app_shell: src/components/layout/app-shell.tsx — uses React 19 'derive state in render' pattern: if (pathname !== lastPath) setOpen(false) instead of useEffect side-effect
shell_components.header: src/components/layout/header.tsx — adds <ThemeSwitcher /> + <LanguageSwitcher /> on the right; mobile menu button + brand on the left
shell_components.sidebar: src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx — fully i18n'd via t('nav.*'); version line reads pkg.version from package.json (build-time inlined)
shell_components.language_switcher: src/components/language-switcher.tsx — segmented control (EN / 中) with sliding thumb (style left = activeIndex * 1.75rem); thumb is pointer-events-none so clicks reach buttons; buttons aria-pressed
shell_components.theme_switcher: src/components/theme-switcher.tsx — mirrors LanguageSwitcher; Sun/Moon icons; thumb opacity 0 until hydrated to avoid SSR snapshot painting thumb under wrong tab

reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.page_file: src/app/reports/page.tsx (REWRITTEN to add Run-Now button + SSE progress panel)
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.state_machine: RunPhase = 'idle'|'starting'|'running'|'done'|'error'; RunState = {phase, startedAt, activeIndex, errorMessage, conflict}
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.stage_order: STAGE_ORDER = ['ingestion','processing','embedding','report']; STAGE_LABEL_KEY: Record<DailyStageName, TranslationKey> maps to reports.run.stage.* i18n keys
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.log_buffer_cap: MAX_LOG_LINES = 2000 — appendLog() slices oldest entries when buffer overflows, preventing tab OOM during 100k-line cold-start runs
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.mount_flow: useEffect on mount: listReports(30) + getDailyStatus() — if status.running, set RunState{phase:'running', activeIndex:STAGE_ORDER.indexOf(status.current_stage), conflict:true} so button stays disabled (no reattach to live SSE; just informational). Status fetch failure is non-fatal — keep idle state
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.handle_run: handleRun creates AbortController -> abortRef.current -> for await (const ev of runDailyStream({signal})) -> applyEvent dispatches by ev.type (started/stage/log/error/done). sawTerminal flag tracks whether stream ended cleanly; if false on EOF, set 'connectionLost' error message. On done, listReports(30) refresh.
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.error_handling: try/catch differentiates DailyConflictError (HTTP 409 -> conflict UI), AbortError (silent — user cancel), other Error (red bubble + log panel). finally clears abortRef ONLY if it still points at this handler's controller (prevents older finally from clobbering newer send)
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.run_panel_ui: RunPanel: status header (AlertCircle red / Check emerald / Loader2 amber depending on phase) + relative-time start ('刚刚' / 'X 分钟前' / etc via formatRelativeTime), 4 StagePills (pending/running/done/error 4 colors), collapsible log panel (<pre> whitespace-pre-wrap break-words font-mono with ScrollArea), Reload button on terminal phase
reports_run_now_2026_05_03_22_34.format_relative_time: Custom formatRelativeTime(iso, locale) with 4 buckets (just now / Xm / Xh / Xd ago + Chinese counterparts) — avoids Intl.RelativeTimeFormat per-render overhead

coverage_summary.estimated_repo_files: ~180 (excluding node_modules/.venv/.next/data; rough estimate; +15 from last run reflecting new lib/i18n + lib/theme + reports run-panel + 2 layout switchers)
coverage_summary.notes: Major delta vs 2026-05-03 21:41:00: (a) NEW frontend/src/lib/i18n/{provider.tsx,translations.ts,format.ts} — full i18n module with LocaleProvider/useLocale/useT, en+zh ~110-key dictionary, locale-aware formatDate/formatLongDate, localStorage 'gpgpu-kb.locale.v1' persistence, SSR-safe with DEFAULT_LOCALE='en' fallback, document.documentElement.lang sync. TranslationKey = keyof typeof translations.en (en is source of truth). (b) NEW frontend/src/lib/theme/provider.tsx — full theme module with ThemeProvider/useTheme, THEME_STORAGE_KEY='gpgpu-kb.theme.v1', DEFAULT_THEME='dark', light+dark only. (c) FOUC-prevention: app/layout.tsx <head> contains an inline <script dangerouslySetInnerHTML> that synchronously reads localStorage.getItem('gpgpu-kb.theme.v1') and toggles <html class='dark'> BEFORE React mounts (storage key literal HARDCODED, must stay in sync with THEME_STORAGE_KEY). suppressHydrationWarning silences React class/lang warnings. viewport.themeColor dual-mode follows OS prefers-color-scheme. (d) NEW Cream Linen / Walnut Hearth oklch dual themes in src/app/globals.css — replaces ALL bg-zinc-950 hardcodes; @theme inline maps shadcn tokens to oklch CSS variables on :root + .dark; @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *)) declares dark variant. CODING CONVENTION CHANGE: new components must use semantic tokens (bg-background, bg-card, bg-sidebar, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground) not bg-zinc-*. (e) Header now contains <ThemeSwitcher /> + <LanguageSwitcher /> segmented controls; Sidebar fully i18n'd via t('nav.*'); AppShell uses React 19 derive-state-in-render pattern (if (pathname !== lastPath) setOpen(false)). NEW src/components/{language,theme}-switcher.tsx with mirrored visual design (pill + sliding thumb at left=activeIndex*1.75rem, pointer-events-none thumb). (f) NEW backend POST /api/daily/stream + GET /api/daily/status in backend/kb/main.py — Bearer-token-guarded same as /api/chat[/stream]. _DailyRunState singleton (threading.Lock + _running flag + Queue(maxsize=2000)) atomically claims slot; second concurrent POST gets HTTP 409. _run_daily_in_worker(queue) runs in daemon thread (NO subprocess); does `from kb.daily import run_daily_pipeline` lazy import so test monkeypatch.setattr(daily_mod, 'run_daily_pipeline', ...) is hit. _QueueLogHandler captures root logger; _QueueStdoutWriter via contextlib.redirect_stdout captures kb/daily.py's banner print() lines. finally MUST put_nowait('__terminator__') sentinel or generator hangs forever on queue.get(timeout=15). _STAGE_PATTERN=r'\[([1-4])/4\]' matches both English and Chinese banners (kb/daily.py prefix is fixed contract). event_stream(): started -> stage(<=4) -> log(N) -> done|error; 15s idle yield ': keepalive\n\n' SSE comment frame; X-Accel-Buffering: no + Cache-Control: no-cache. NO reattach mechanism — SSE ownership belongs to originating POST connection. Browser close doesn't interrupt pipeline (daemon thread continues). (g) NEW frontend/src/lib/api.ts: getDailyStatus() (GET /api/daily/status) + runDailyStream({signal?}) async generator (POST /api/daily/stream, body '{}', Accept: text/event-stream) + DailyConflictError extends Error (HTTP 409) + _parseDailyFrame (CRITICAL: skips lines starting with ':' to drop SSE keepalive comment frames; without this JSON.parse would throw). (h) NEW frontend/src/lib/types.ts: DailyStatus{running,started_at,current_stage} / DailyStageName='ingestion'|'processing'|'embedding'|'report' / DailyStreamEvent discriminated union. (i) frontend/src/app/reports/page.tsx COMPLETELY REWRITTEN: RunPhase state machine ('idle'|'starting'|'running'|'done'|'error') + RunState{phase, startedAt, activeIndex, errorMessage, conflict}. Mount flow: listReports(30) + getDailyStatus() — if status.running set conflict=true (button locked, no reattach). handleRun creates AbortController -> for await (const ev of runDailyStream({signal})) -> applyEvent dispatch (started/stage/log/error/done). MAX_LOG_LINES=2000 buffer cap. RunPanel UI: status header + 4 StagePills (pending/running/done/error 4 colors) + collapsible log panel + Reload button on terminal phase. Custom formatRelativeTime(iso, locale) 4-bucket relative time. (j) Backend tests: NEW 6 daily-pipeline SSE cases in backend/tests/test_api_smoke.py via _drain_daily_sse helper (mirrors _drain_sse but skips ':' keepalive frames) + _patch_daily(monkeypatch, fake_pipeline) helper + _reset_daily_state() helper: idle status / happy 4-stage flow (English banners) / 409 concurrency via threading.Event blocked fake pipeline / pipeline raise -> error frame (no done) / Bearer token guard on both /api/daily/{status,stream} / Chinese banner '[1/4] 数据采集' / '[2/4] 处理（摘要 + 打分）' detected by _STAGE_PATTERN. All deltas verified by reading the actual modified source files in this run.

next_steps: 实施 KB_CHAT_TOKEN 时同步扩 frontend/src/lib/api.ts 的 fetchJSON / chatStream / getDailyStatus / runDailyStream（本轮新增的两个 daily 端点也受守卫）：通过 server-side route handler 在 Next 里转发 Bearer，避免暴露 NEXT_PUBLIC_*

为本轮 SSE / themed i18n 扩展 e2e 用例：⑤ Reports 页 Run-Now 按钮 → mock SSE 4-stage 序列 → 验证 4 个 StagePill 切换；⑥ HTTP 409 → conflict UI；⑦ getDailyStatus().running=true mount 时按钮锁住；⑧ 切语言 → header / sidebar 文案立即跟进；⑨ 切主题 → <html> class 切换 + 颜色不闪
为 useConversationHistory 添加 vitest 单测覆盖 _isConversation / _safeWrite 配额满 / hydration
为 _parseSSEFrame / _parseDailyFrame 添加 vitest 单测覆盖多行 data: 拼接、event 缺失、JSON 解析失败 silent drop、跳过 ':' keepalive 注释帧
为 i18n _interpolate 添加 vitest 单测覆盖 {name} 替换 / 缺失 placeholder / params 是 number 转 string
扫描 frontend/src/components/ui/* 以列出已落地的 shadcn 原语清单（已加 Tabs / Dialog / Skeleton）
读取 frontend/eslint.config.* / tsconfig.json / postcss.config.* 以记录构建/类型/lint 约定
深扫 backend/tests/conftest.py 验证 _init_db / client 夹具如何隔离 SQLite 与 ChromaDB
扫 backend/kb/ingestion/arxiv.py 与 github_trending.py 源码以核实 cs.* 类目列表与 polite-sleep 触发条件
为 docs/ 目录补充实际内容或在根 CLAUDE.md 中标注其用途
若 source-anchored chat 的 PDF 解析在生产报错率高，考虑加白名单 substring 或 Content-Type 嗅探（避免 HTML 误判）
把 _MAX_PDF_BYTES / _DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_S / _MAX_EXTRACTED_CHARS / _SOURCE_TEXT_PROMPT_CAP / _HISTORY_TURN_CAP / MAX_LOG_LINES / Queue(maxsize=2000) 全部提到 settings 里，便于无重启调参
评估把 chat 系统 prompt 也接到 KB_LANGUAGE 或前端 locale，或加新变量 KB_CHAT_LANGUAGE 独立控制
考虑 SSE 端点真正发 'error' 事件而非静默吞掉 stream_llm 异常（chat 路径）
扫 src/app/page.tsx / chat/page.tsx 确认所有字面量字符串是否都已替换为 t() 调用（本轮新增 i18n 后需要全栈 audit）
考虑给 daily pipeline SSE 端点加 'reattach' 机制（SSE Last-Event-ID 或单独的 status-broadcast endpoint），让多 tab / 多用户可同时观察一次 in-flight run
评估在 frontend/src/lib/i18n/ 下加自动校验脚本（预 commit hook：translations.zh 必须含 translations.en 的所有 key）

changelog.summary: Created root CLAUDE.md, backend/CLAUDE.md, frontend/CLAUDE.md, and .claude/index.json

Synced docs with code deltas: deepseek LLM provider, /api/chat Bearer Token guard via verify_chat_token + hmac.compare_digest (KB_CHAT_TOKEN), .github/workflows/ci.yml (3-job CI), Playwright e2e suite, backend/tests/README.md.
Documented KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0), is_processed buckets 0/1/2, /api/papers default-hides low quality, /api/stats split into processed/skipped_low_quality/pending.

Universal Score Axes (paper/blog/talk/project rubrics + paper legacy mirroring), Chinese-language LLM mode (KB_LANGUAGE), Docker Compose deployment stack (backend/frontend Dockerfiles + .dockerignore + docker-compose.yml + .env.docker.example), Next.js standalone build with /api/* reverse proxy (eliminates CORS), adaptive ingestion lookback window (KB_INGEST_*), cold-start uncapped processing/embedding, one-shot rescore_non_papers.py operations script, RSS feed pruning (AnandTech / Meta AI Blog removed), PaperOut.categories field_validator for legacy dict tags.

Multi-turn + source-anchored chat refresh: ChatMessage / ChatRequest schema additions; _format_history (12 turn cap); paper_id branch with fetch_full_text; NEW kb/processing/pdf.py; Paper.full_text TEXT column; pypdf>=5.0 default dep; --timeout-keep-alive 75 fix; frontend chat refactor with two-pane layout, useConversationHistory hook (localStorage gpgpu-kb.chat.conversations.v1), ChatRightSidebar with Tabs (History|Source), SourcePicker dialog, /chat?paperId= deep-link auto-pin; mobile responsive; new tests test_processing_pdf.py + 5 chat-mode cases. Suite ~95 -> ~105.

SSE streaming chat: NEW POST /api/chat/stream (text/event-stream; sources -> token... -> done [+ optional error]; placeholder '(LLM produced no output)' on empty; X-Accel-Buffering: no + Cache-Control: no-cache); NEW shared _build_chat_context(req, db) extracted so /api/chat and /api/chat/stream share prompt + sources construction; HTTPException raised BEFORE StreamingResponse so paper_id 404 surfaces as normal HTTP error. Chat system prompts switched to hardcoded Chinese — KB_LANGUAGE no longer affects chat. NEW _sse_event(event, data) helper. NEW stream_llm(prompt) parallel public API; _STREAM_PROVIDERS dict {hermes, anthropic, openai, deepseek}; failures end generator silently; _stream_anthropic uses messages.stream.text_stream; _stream_openai_compatible(api_key, model, base_url=None) shared body; _stream_hermes single-chunk fallback. NEW chatStream(request, {signal?}) async generator in frontend/src/lib/api.ts; ChatStreamEvent discriminated union in types.ts; chat page completely rewritten for streaming with Stop button (red Square), AbortController in abortRef, 3-state finalize. NEW 5 SSE cases in test_api_smoke.py + 5 stream_llm cases in test_processing_llm.py. Suite ~105 -> ~115.

New blog source vLLM Blog (RSS) + LMSYS / SGLang Blog (sitemap-driven via NEW kb/ingestion/sitemap_blog.py: SitemapSource dataclass + xml.etree.ElementTree parsing + per-page og:* meta extraction + 60-articles-per-source cap + loose date format support like 'April 29, 2026'); kb/ingestion/run.py orchestrates as independent stage results['sitemap_blogs']; ~30 unit tests + orchestrator tests upgraded to 4 fetchers; pytest 174/174 pass.

Per-Paper.source_name ingest cold-start: NEW _lookback_for_source(source_name) in kb/ingestion/run.py with optional WHERE source_name=:name filter; cold-start (KB_INGEST_EMPTY_DB_DAYS) when no row for that source_name. _compute_days_back() now wraps _lookback_for_source(None). All 4 fetchers (fetch_recent_papers / fetch_recent_posts / fetch_recent_sitemap_posts / fetch_trending_repos) signature unified to days_back: int | None; lazy-import _lookback_for_source from inside the fetcher body to avoid circular top-level imports. Effect: adding a new RSS feed or SitemapSource auto-triggers 30-day backfill for ONLY that source on next daily run. Tests 174 -> 180 pass.

Fast / Expert dual-role LLM: NEW Settings.llm_expert_provider / llm_expert_model (both Optional[str], default None — transparent fallback to fast). NEW _resolve_role(role) -> (provider_name, model_override): role='expert' -> (llm_expert_provider or llm_provider, llm_expert_model); else -> (llm_provider, None). All _call_* / _stream_* providers gain (prompt, *, model: str | None = None) kwarg; model=None falls back to settings.<provider>_model, non-None overrides. _stream_openai_compatible already required model as kwarg. Hermes accepts but ignores model (CLI has no --model flag). call_llm(prompt, role='fast') / stream_llm(prompt, role='fast') resolve role then call _PROVIDERS[provider_name](prompt, model=model_override). _call_llm = call_llm back-compat alias. /api/chat -> call_llm(role='expert'); /api/chat/stream -> stream_llm(role='expert'); summarize_and_score and generate_daily_report stay default fast. Tests: provider-dispatch assertions upgraded to model=None kwarg; 6 NEW role-overlay cases (expert routes to expert provider; fallback to fast when expert unset; model override passed; fast ignores expert model; stream mirrors expert route; stream mirrors expert model override). Suite 180 -> 203 pass. .env.docker.example adds expert role examples (same provider model swap + cross-provider fast/expert pairing). NO breaking changes — historical deployments without KB_LLM_EXPERT_* env behave identically.

Themed i18n frontend shell + manual daily-pipeline trigger endpoints (SSE progress). Frontend: (a) NEW frontend/src/lib/i18n/{provider.tsx,translations.ts,format.ts} — full i18n module: LocaleProvider with React Context + localStorage 'gpgpu-kb.locale.v1' persistence; SSR always renders DEFAULT_LOCALE='en' to match SSR markup, mount-effect reconciles to persisted; document.documentElement.lang sync ('zh-CN' / 'en') for a11y / browser translation / :lang() selector; en/zh ~110-key dictionary covering brand/shell/nav/lang/theme/search/browse/card/score/paper/reports.run.*/stats/chat/picker; TranslationKey = keyof typeof translations.en (en is source of truth, missing zh keys silently render raw key — no lint check, manual review); _interpolate supports {name} placeholders (NO ICU plurals); formatDate / formatLongDate / localeTag wrap Date.toLocaleDateString with locale-aware tags. (b) NEW frontend/src/lib/theme/provider.tsx — ThemeProvider with React Context + localStorage 'gpgpu-kb.theme.v1' persistence; THEME_STORAGE_KEY constant, DEFAULT_THEME='dark', THEMES=['light','dark']; useEffect classes.toggle('dark'). (c) FOUC-prevention in app/layout.tsx: inline <script dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: THEME_INIT_SCRIPT}}> in <head> reads localStorage SYNCHRONOUSLY before React mounts and toggles <html class='dark'>; painted body never flickers. THIS INLINE SCRIPT HARDCODES 'gpgpu-kb.theme.v1' LITERAL — must stay in sync with THEME_STORAGE_KEY (no IDE check). <html lang='en' className='h-full antialiased dark' suppressHydrationWarning> silences React class/lang mismatch warnings. viewport.themeColor dual-mode follows OS prefers-color-scheme (independent of <html class> runtime toggle). (d) NEW Cream Linen / Walnut Hearth oklch dual themes in src/app/globals.css — REPLACES all bg-zinc-950 hardcodes; @theme inline maps shadcn tokens (--color-card / --color-primary / --color-secondary / --color-muted / --color-accent / --color-destructive / --color-border / --color-input / --color-ring / --color-popover / --color-sidebar (+ -foreground/-primary/-accent/-border/-ring) / --color-chart-1..5 / --radius-*) to oklch values on :root (Cream Linen: parchment cream + caramel amber + chestnut brown — long-form-reading friendly) and .dark (Walnut Hearth: walnut bark + roasted cocoa + toasted amber + oat-mist — cozy fireside dark). @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *)) declares Tailwind v4 dark variant. CODING CONVENTION CHANGE: new components MUST use semantic tokens (bg-background / bg-card / bg-sidebar / text-foreground / text-muted-foreground / bg-primary text-primary-foreground), NOT bg-zinc-* hardcodes. Exceptions: red-600 for Stop button, emerald-500 for done state. (e) AppShell / Header / Sidebar refactor: layout.tsx wraps <ThemeProvider><LocaleProvider><AppShell>; AppShell uses React 19 'derive state in render' pattern (if (pathname !== lastPath) setOpen(false)) instead of useEffect side-effect; Header adds <ThemeSwitcher /> + <LanguageSwitcher /> segmented controls (pill + sliding thumb at left=activeIndex*1.75rem; pointer-events-none thumb; ThemeSwitcher thumb opacity=0 until hydrated to avoid SSR snapshot painting under wrong tab); Sidebar fully i18n'd via t('nav.*') with version line reading pkg.version from package.json. NEW src/components/{language,theme}-switcher.tsx with mirrored visual design (Sun/Moon for theme, EN/中 for language). Backend: (f) NEW POST /api/daily/stream + GET /api/daily/status in backend/kb/main.py — Bearer-token-guarded same as /api/chat[/stream] (any 'expensive / writing / job-triggering' endpoint MUST reuse verify_chat_token going forward — convention). _DailyRunState singleton (threading.Lock + _running flag + Queue(maxsize=2000)) atomically claims slot via try_start(); second concurrent POST gets HTTPException(409, 'A daily pipeline run is already in progress.'). _run_daily_in_worker(queue) runs in daemon thread (NO subprocess); function body does `from kb.daily import run_daily_pipeline` LAZY IMPORT so test monkeypatch.setattr(daily_mod, 'run_daily_pipeline', ...) is hit. _QueueLogHandler attached to root logger captures logging.* lines; _QueueStdoutWriter via contextlib.redirect_stdout captures kb/daily.py's '[N/4] <stage>' banner print() lines. finally MUST queue.put_nowait(('__terminator__', None)) sentinel — without it generator hangs forever on queue.get(timeout=15). _STAGE_PATTERN = re.compile(r'\[([1-4])/4\]') + _STAGE_NAMES dict — kb/daily.py prints [N/4] prefix regardless of KB_LANGUAGE so both 'INGESTION' and '数据采集' banners trigger stage events; this is HARD CONTRACT between kb/daily.py banner format and main.py _STAGE_PATTERN. event_stream(): yield started -> loop queue.get(timeout=15): __terminator__ -> emit done if not terminal_emitted, break; __done__/__error__ -> emit + terminal_emitted=True suppresses dup; Empty -> yield ': keepalive\n\n' SSE comment frame (frontend _parseDailyFrame must skip ':' lines); log -> _STAGE_PATTERN.search to dedup-emit stage frames + emit log frame. Headers X-Accel-Buffering: no + Cache-Control: no-cache. NO reattach mechanism — SSE ownership belongs to originating POST connection; other tabs poll /api/daily/status for in-flight UI but cannot consume live stream. Browser close doesn't interrupt — daemon thread continues to completion. Frontend reports page: (g) src/app/reports/page.tsx COMPLETELY REWRITTEN with Run-Now button + SSE progress panel: RunPhase = 'idle'|'starting'|'running'|'done'|'error'; RunState{phase, startedAt, activeIndex, errorMessage, conflict}; STAGE_ORDER + STAGE_LABEL_KEY (i18n keys reports.run.stage.*). Mount: listReports(30) + getDailyStatus() — if status.running set conflict=true (button locked, no reattach). handleRun: AbortController -> abortRef -> for await (const ev of runDailyStream({signal})) -> applyEvent dispatches by ev.type. MAX_LOG_LINES=2000 buffer cap; appendLog slices oldest on overflow. RunPanel UI: status header (AlertCircle red / Check emerald / Loader2 amber) + relative-time start ('刚刚' / 'X 分钟前' via custom formatRelativeTime 4-bucket impl) + 4 StagePills (pending/running/done/error 4 colors) + collapsible log panel (<pre> whitespace-pre-wrap break-words font-mono) + Reload button on terminal phase. Error handling differentiates DailyConflictError (HTTP 409 -> conflict UI), AbortError (silent — user cancel), other Error (red bubble + log panel). finally clears abortRef ONLY if abortRef.current === controller. Frontend API client: (h) NEW frontend/src/lib/api.ts: getDailyStatus() (GET /api/daily/status) + runDailyStream({signal?}) async generator (POST /api/daily/stream, body '{}', Accept: text/event-stream) + DailyConflictError extends Error (HTTP 409) + _parseDailyFrame (CRITICAL: skips lines starting with ':' to drop SSE keepalive comment frames + skips empty lines; without these JSON.parse would throw on every keepalive). reader.releaseLock() in try/catch (throws after abort — safe to swallow). (i) NEW frontend/src/lib/types.ts: DailyStatus{running, started_at, current_stage} / DailyStageName='ingestion'|'processing'|'embedding'|'report' / DailyStreamEvent discriminated union (started{started_at} | stage{index:1|2|3|4, name:DailyStageName} | log{line} | error{message} | done). Stats.top_overall unchanged. Tests: (j) NEW 6 daily-pipeline SSE cases in backend/tests/test_api_smoke.py via _drain_daily_sse helper (mirrors _drain_sse but skips ':' keepalive frames) + _patch_daily(monkeypatch, fake_pipeline) helper (monkeypatch.setattr(daily_mod, 'run_daily_pipeline', ...) — worker thread lazy import hits the patch) + _reset_daily_state() helper (force-clear singleton between tests since session-scoped TestClient shares app instance): test_daily_status_idle_by_default / test_daily_stream_emits_started_stages_and_done (English banners, 4 stages in order, log frames contain banner lines) / test_daily_stream_concurrent_returns_409 (threading.Event blocks fake pipeline, second POST gets 409 while first still running, then release.set() to let first finish) / test_daily_stream_pipeline_exception_emits_error (RuntimeError -> error frame, no done frame, message contains 'boom') / test_daily_endpoints_require_token_when_set (KB_CHAT_TOKEN set -> both endpoints return 401 without/with-wrong token, 200/!=401 with correct token) / test_daily_stage_pattern_matches_chinese_banner ('[1/4] 数据采集' / '[2/4] 处理（摘要 + 打分）' / '[3/4] 向量化' / '[4/4] 每日简报' all detected by _STAGE_PATTERN). NO impact on: DB schema / migration / Docker / hermes/anthropic/openai/deepseek provider behavior / chat multi-turn / SSE streaming chat / fast-expert dual role / per-source ingest cold-start / sitemap blog. run_daily_pipeline() function itself is UNCHANGED — it remains both the CLI entry (python -m kb.daily) and the cron container entry (docker compose --profile cron run --rm daily) and now also the /api/daily/stream worker-thread lazy-import target — all three entry points share the same code and SQLite write lock. All deltas verified by reading the actual modified source files in this run.
